text: It is also possible to search other registries such as , and other primary registries of the ICTRP Network that can be found. There are currently no ICTRP Internship positions available. The Crawling service is currently not available.

text: If you wish to use this service in 2025 or when it is made available please Download COVID-19 trials in CSV format [updated monthly] Download COVID-19 trials in XML format [updated monthly] Fill this form to request access to the Sharepoint folder for downloading all new/updated records from the ICTRP database List of external search platforms that use the ICTRP data List of other registries that are not part of the ICTRP Registries Network The mission of the WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform is to ensure that a complete view of research is accessible to all those involved in health care decision making.
source: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)

text: This will improve research transparency and will ultimately strengthen the validity and value of the scientific evidence base. The registration of all interventional trials is a scientific, ethical and moral responsibility. You cannot register a trial with WHO. The WHO ICTRP is not a clinical trials registry.
source: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)

text: In order to register a trial, please contact one of the For the purposes of registration, a clinical trial is any research study that prospectively assigns human participants or groups of humans to one or more health-related interventions to evaluate the effects on health outcomes. Clinical trials may also be referred to as interventional trials.
source: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)

text: Interventions include but are not restricted to drugs, cells and other biological products, surgical procedures, radiologic procedures, devices, behavioural treatments, process-of-care changes, preventive care, etc.
source: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)

text: This definition includes WHO regards trial registration as the publication of an internationally-agreed set of information about the design, conduct and administration of clinical trials.
source: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)

text: These details are published on a publicly-accessible website managed by a registry conforming to Organizations with policies on clinical trial registration What is the difference between a clinical trials register and registry? source: WHO International Clinical Trials Registry Platform (ICTRP)
